details.test: Task 1: Add 3 gluten-free snack products under $20 with 4+ stars to cart
Task 2: Order 2 cheapest gluten-free, nut-free bars (3 units each)
Task 3: Select heaviest snack case under $50 and order 4 units
Task 4: Add 2 nut-free granola bar cases (>=20 bars, <=10g sugar/bar), 2 cases each
Task 5: Compare 2 nut-free bars and add the one with lower fat per 100g (qty 5)
Task 6: Add 10 cases of qualifying chips and apply promo code 'PROMO10'
Task 7: Submit technical datasheet request for searched granola product
Task 8: Save 3 snack products with shelf life >=8 months to favorites
Task 9: Request private label cereal quote for 500g bag, MOQ 1000
